  AND shift_status = 'NoShow'

57b92c12aaa26dc514b6c8a3122993b3b4738de4:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN shift_status = 'NoShow' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1)
FROM shifts
WHERE
  shift_date >= '2026-02-01' AND shift_date < '2026-03-01'
33c7b7366eb7124e5b7ecca81a65d87c17383735:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN shift_status = 'NoShow' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1)
FROM shifts
WHERE
  shift_date >= '2026-05-01' AND shift_date < '2026-06-01'
7816b00cccbf031901bd20568471793eaa65c63d:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN shift_category = 'Unscheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN shift_category = 'Scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unscheduled_to_scheduled_ratio
FROM shifts
WHERE
  shift_date >= '2026-04-01' AND shift_date < '2026-05-01';
